examples: After its election defeat, the party needs to regroup.
Summer is a time to relax, regroup and catch up on all those things you've been putting off all year.
It would regroup and reappear in the rear.
Their bravery gave Christendom time both to regroup, and to realize the gravity of the threat.
Scramble the desks, force them to regroup and continually rewire their brains to know more.
